name: Sending a quote on /assistant pushes a new entry into /dashboard activity feed without refresh
description: When a quote is locked-and-sent in the assistant, the system records an activity event ('Quote sent to your client'). If /dashboard is open in another tab (same browser session), the shared dash-cache subscriber on the dashboard activity panel should pick up the new event on the next refreshDash() — without a full page reload. The activity entry appears at the top with the correct icon and 'just now' relative time.

persona.name: Diego Martínez
persona.context: Has /dashboard pinned in tab 1 and /assistant in tab 2.

preconditions: User authenticated; both tabs reflect the same session
Account has at least 2 prior activity events

steps.action: (tab 2 /assistant) Drafts and locks a new quote
steps.expect: Action card flips to 'sent'; assistant emits a new activity event server-side
DashCache snapshot includes the new activity entry; subscribers re-render without flicker
Top row shows the new 'Quote sent to your client' event with correct icon (.activity-item__icon) and 'just now' time
Quotes badge increments by 1 if the new quote enters the 'sent' track

evaluationCriteria.check: New activity row inserts above existing rows without layout jank
Cross-tab consistency feels live without being noisy — no toast spam
DashCache is the single source; sidebar and activity panel both subscribe to it
New row is announced via an aria-live='polite' region or only on the user's next focus event (not interrupting)
